name: The Sand Trapp
about: The Sand Trapp is an indoor golf training facility that combines state-of-the-art technology with a luxury performance environment. It offers a comprehensive, all-in approach to training, featuring advanced launch monitors, high-speed cameras, and 3D motion analysis for in-depth swing reviews. The facility is designed for players of all levels, from beginners competing for their first swing breakthrough to high-level athletes seeking to sharpen their edge, with sessions led by elite PGA professionals and TPI-certified trainers. The space integrates golf instruction, fitness programs, and technology to deliver smarter performance and a complete training experience under one roof.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including Foresight GCQuad, GC Hawk, Swing Catalyst, and Sportsbox AI for detailed swing analysis
Spacious, private bays designed for comfort and an exclusive indoor country club experience
Comprehensive all-in-one training approach integrating golf instruction, fitness, and performance technology
Premium course play options with full club and ball data feedback synced to coaching tools

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of on-site bar or alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with advanced tracking capabilities
Advanced launch monitor for detailed ball flight data
3D motion analysis system for swing evaluation

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own, but it mentions having premium club and ball data feedback, suggesting a focus on personal equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a BYOB policy or food restrictions on the website, implying you may be able to bring your own, but this should be confirmed directly with the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18-hole rounds, but it mentions premium course play options, which typically take 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage and pace of play.

faq.question: Is The Sand Trapp kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Sand Trapp offers Junior Golf Performance programs designed for young athletes, indicating it is kid-friendly and provides a supportive environment for developing golf skills in children.
